key_intelligence: ABROAD with strong financials: 3,769/mo net vs 1,390/mo mortgage. 13%+VAT offer applied (expired May 31). Strong loss-averse profile: keeping the property empty or on LTL while living abroad is leaving significant money on the table. GL-TIME green light. Borehamwood has good Elstree Studios/film industry demand plus commuter corridor. NOTE: Entry 038 has 3 leads — Noemi (canonical), Isobel (see 046/047), Abby Thomas (see 064).

lead_language: I need this to be completely hands-off
